headline: Xcel Energy Inc. Board Declares Dividend on Common Stock
summary: MINNEAPOLIS, May 20, 2026--The Board of Directors of Xcel Energy Inc. (NASDAQ: XEL) today declared a quarterly dividend on its common stock of 59.25 cents per share. The dividends are payable July 20, 2026, to shareholders of record on June 15, 2026.

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Xcel Energy (XEL) After Its Recent Share Price Climb?
summary: Wondering whether Xcel Energy at around US$79.73 is offering fair value right now, or if the current price leaves limited room for upside. The stock has been fairly steady in the short term, with a 7 day return of a 0.2% decline and a 30 day return of a 1.7% decline, while the longer term picture shows a 6.8% gain year to date and 13.7% over the past year. Over the past few months, headlines around regulated utilities, grid reliability and the role of electricity providers in supporting data...
